data.label: Fake
data.explanation: Naku, mhie, baliktad yata ang chismis! According to the news, Timberwolves nga ang nanalo against Spurs. So fake news ito, sis!
evidence: Multiple sources report that the Timberwolves defeated the Spurs in Game 1 (May 4, 2026).
Sources include ESPN, New York Times, and NBA.com.
data.factCorrection: The claim says the Spurs won Game 1 against the Timberwolves, but according to ESPN and other sources, the Timberwolves won 104-102.

data.summary: Mhie, bago tayo mag-celebrate, double check muna natin yung team na nanalo kasi baka nagkabaliktad!
data.tip: Next time, sis, check mo agad sa official NBA website or ESPN para sureball yung chika!

data.details: Walang credible evidence na nahanap. Ingat sa pagsha-share!

harmScore.explanation: High risk of misinformation. Sharing this could mislead others.

literacyLesson.summary: Mhie, bago tayo mag-celebrate, double check muna natin yung team na nanalo kasi baka nagkabaliktad!

points.issue: Teh, according to ESPN, NBA.com, and New York Times, Timberwolves pala ang nanalo, hindi ang Spurs.
points.correction: Dapat tignan natin yung mga trusted sports websites para sure tayo sa score at walang palya.

points.issue: Hindi enough na basta may narinig lang tayo, need natin ng solid evidence from credible sources.
points.correction: Hanapin natin yung mga official reports or reputable news outlets para iwas fake news.

points.issue: Sis, tandaan, fact-check muna bago share para di tayo mapahiya sa mga socmed friends natin.
points.correction: Compare notes from multiple sources para sure na consistent ang info.

literacyLesson.tip: Next time, sis, check mo agad sa official NBA website or ESPN para sureball yung chika!
